app.name: TravelPlatform
app.missingApiKey: Please set your Gemini API key in Settings first.
app.scanSuccess: Document scanned! Extracted {{events}} events and {{expenses}} expenses.
app.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
app.rateLimitError: Rate limit reached. Please wait a moment.
app.offlineError: You are offline. This action will sync when you reconnect.

auth.title: Welcome to TravelPlatform
auth.subtitle: AI-driven trip planning for groups and families
auth.restricted: Access restricted. Contact your trip admin.

itinerary.title: Trip Itinerary
itinerary.aiPlaceholder: Describe a booking, activity, or event to add...

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.noTasks: No tasks yet. Enjoy your trip!

chat.title: Group Chat
chat.noMessages: No messages yet. Be the first!

locations.title: Family Locations
locations.sharingOff: Your location is off. Enable it in Settings to share.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyHelp: Stored in localStorage only — never sent to Firestore
settings.addUserHelp: New users are added as viewers. Change roles in Firestore.

onboarding.title: Create Your Trip
onboarding.step2Help: You can invite more participants from Settings after the trip is created.
onboarding.preferencesHelp: The AI will use this to personalize your itinerary
onboarding.semanticHelp2: Paste any booking confirmations, email text, or itinerary details. The AI will extract flights, hotels, tours as fixed constraints that cannot be moved.
onboarding.preferences: Describe your preferences, interests, and any must-dos...
onboarding.pasteBookings: Paste any confirmed bookings (flights, hotels, tours)...
onboarding.analyzeWarning: Could not analyze bookings with AI. They will be saved as-is.
onboarding.aiSetupDesc: Provide your Gemini API key to let the AI automatically build your full itinerary, generate smart tasks, and scan your documents and expenses.
onboarding.apiKeyHelp: Your key is saved locally in your browser and never sent to our servers.
onboarding.getApiKeyHelp: Get your free API key here
onboarding.aiDisabledWarning: AI features like document scanning are disabled.
onboarding.keyInvalid: Invalid API Key. Please try again.
onboarding.manualModeNotice: You are creating a manual trip without AI. To unlock automatic itinerary and task generation, add your API key in Settings.
onboarding.generatingSubtitle: We are generating your itinerary, tasks, extracting expenses, and organizing documents. This takes about 15-30 seconds.
onboarding.bgTaskGeneration: AI is generating personalized tasks in the background...
onboarding.restoreError: Failed to restore trip from file.
onboarding.restoringSubtitle: Please wait while we set everything up.
onboarding.orRestore: Already have a trip backup file?

errors.noLocation: Location not found. Please enable GPS sharing in Settings.
errors.scanFailed: Failed to analyze image. Please try again.
errors.aiUnavailable: AI is currently unavailable. Check your API key in Settings.
errors.noApiKey: No API key configured. Go to Settings → AI Provider.
errors.networkError: Network error. Your changes are queued and will sync when online.

wizard.title: AI Trip Builder
wizard.subtitle: Select suggestions from AI or enter your own preferences.
wizard.manualPlaceholder: E.g. I want to start in Tokyo and travel by Shinkansen...
wizard.error: Failed to generate itinerary. Please try again.
